# Kiwi Web Design

> Kiwi Web Design is the trading name of Ika Tech Limited, an Auckland web design and digital marketing business founded by Charlie Chao. Based in Grey Lynn and serving businesses across New Zealand.

## Core Services

- [Web Design for Auckland Small Businesses](https://www.kiwiwebdesign.co.nz/small-business-website-design-auckland/): Conversion-focused websites starting from $1,290. Mobile-first, fast-loading, built to turn visitors into enquiries, not just look good.
- [SEO Auckland](https://www.kiwiwebdesign.co.nz/affordable-seo-auckland/): Local SEO targeting buyer keywords for Auckland businesses. Organic visibility that compounds over time and reduces reliance on paid ads.
- [Google Ads Auckland](https://www.kiwiwebdesign.co.nz/google-ads/): PPC campaign setup and management focused on generating calls and enquiries, not wasting ad spend.
- [ChatGPT Ads NZ](https://www.kiwiwebdesign.co.nz/chatgpt-ads/): AI search advertising and ChatGPT Ads readiness for New Zealand businesses, including answer-ready landing pages, schema, tracking, and conversion paths.

## Website Types

- [Small Business Website Design Auckland](https://www.kiwiwebdesign.co.nz/small-business-website-design-auckland/): Conversion-focused website design for Auckland small businesses.
- [Tradie Website Design Auckland](https://www.kiwiwebdesign.co.nz/tradie-website-design-auckland/): Websites for plumbers, electricians, builders, cleaners, and service tradies.
- [eCommerce Website Auckland](https://www.kiwiwebdesign.co.nz/ecommerce-website-auckland/): Online store strategy, design, setup, and conversion planning.
- [Shopify Website Design](https://www.kiwiwebdesign.co.nz/shopify-website-design-auckland/): Shopify store design and setup in Auckland.

## Industries Served

- [Beauty & Wellness](https://www.kiwiwebdesign.co.nz/how-kiwi-web-design-helps-auckland-beauty-industry/): Websites for salons, spas, and beauty businesses in Auckland.
- [Restaurants & Cafés](https://www.kiwiwebdesign.co.nz/how-kiwi-web-design-helps-auckland-restaurants/): Hospitality website design with menus and online bookings.
- [Healthcare](https://www.kiwiwebdesign.co.nz/how-kiwi-web-design-helps-auckland-healthcare/): Medical and healthcare practice websites in Auckland.
- [Lawyers & Professional Services](https://www.kiwiwebdesign.co.nz/how-kiwi-web-design-helps-auckand-lawyers/): Law firm and professional services websites.
- [All Industries](https://www.kiwiwebdesign.co.nz/industries-we-serve-in-auckland/): Overview of all industries served across Auckland.

## Location Pages

- [North Shore Website Design](https://www.kiwiwebdesign.co.nz/north-shore-website-design/): Web design for Takapuna, Devonport, Milford, and North Shore businesses.
- [South Auckland Web Design](https://www.kiwiwebdesign.co.nz/south-auckland-web-design/): Web design for Manukau, Papakura, and South Auckland businesses.
- [West Auckland Web Design](https://www.kiwiwebdesign.co.nz/west-auckland-web-design/): Web design for Henderson, Te Atatu, Waitakere businesses.
- [East Auckland Web Design](https://www.kiwiwebdesign.co.nz/east-auckland-web-design/): Web design for Howick, Pakuranga, Botany businesses.
- [Central Auckland Web Design](https://www.kiwiwebdesign.co.nz/central-auckland-web-design/): Web design for CBD, Parnell, Ponsonby businesses.

## SEO Services

- [Local SEO for Auckland Small Businesses](https://www.kiwiwebdesign.co.nz/local-seo-for-auckland-small-businesses/): Google Maps and local pack optimisation for Auckland.
- [Local SEO for Auckland Small Businesses: 2026 Guide](https://www.kiwiwebdesign.co.nz/affordable-web-design-auckland/local-seo-auckland-small-businesses-2026-guide/): Step-by-step 2026 local SEO guide for Auckland small businesses covering Google Business Profile, reviews, citations, local landing pages, schema, tracking, and AI search visibility.
- [AI SEO for Auckland Small Businesses](https://www.kiwiwebdesign.co.nz/ai-seo-for-auckland-small-businesses/): GEO and AI search optimisation for visibility in ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google AI Overviews.
- [SEO for eCommerce](https://www.kiwiwebdesign.co.nz/seo-for-ecommerce/): Product and category page SEO for Auckland online stores.
- [Google Business Profile Guide](https://www.kiwiwebdesign.co.nz/google-business-profile-guide-for-auckland-businesses/): How to optimise your Google Business Profile for Auckland local search.

## Pricing

- [Website Cost NZ, 2026 Guide](https://www.kiwiwebdesign.co.nz/affordable-web-design-auckland/website-cost-new-zealand-small-business/): Real pricing for small business websites in New Zealand.
- Launch & Get Found: from $1,290, lead-focused website with on-page SEO.
- Lead Growth Engine: from $2,690, website + local SEO + Google Ads setup.
- Sales Accelerator: from $3,890, full-service ongoing website, SEO, and Google Ads management.

## Case Studies

- [Barrett Access Scaffolding](https://www.kiwiwebdesign.co.nz/case-study-scaffolding/): Scaffolding website with sector-specific service paths and an online quote calculator.
- [Beauty Touch Auckland](https://www.kiwiwebdesign.co.nz/beauty-touch-case-study/): Beauty and wellness website with six treatment pages and integrated online booking.

## Blog

- [Auckland Web Design & Business Blog](https://www.kiwiwebdesign.co.nz/affordable-web-design-auckland/): Practical guides and tips for Auckland small business owners on websites, SEO, and digital marketing.
- [SEO vs Google Ads for Auckland Small Businesses](https://www.kiwiwebdesign.co.nz/affordable-web-design-auckland/seo-vs-google-ads-auckland-small-business/): Practical comparison guide helping Auckland small businesses choose between SEO, Google Ads, or an integrated lead-generation strategy.

- [About Kiwi Web Design](https://www.kiwiwebdesign.co.nz/about-us/): Founded by Charlie Chao. Grey Lynn-based web design and digital marketing business serving Auckland and wider New Zealand.
- [Our Process](https://www.kiwiwebdesign.co.nz/website-design-process-in-auckland/): How we work, free consultation, strategy, build, launch.

- [FAQ](https://www.kiwiwebdesign.co.nz/faq/): Common questions about web design, SEO, and Google Ads for Auckland businesses.
